name: Thank You Teacher
original_name: กว่าจะเป็นครู…
overview: Twenty-five-year-old Ko dreams of becoming a teacher. As a child, she was saved by Chaichana, an event that made Ko want to be a good teacher like Chaichana. However, she comes to question what it is to be a good teacher. Ko becomes a teacher as she had hoped, but being a teacher is not easy when she has to face with the education system and the administration of Phatham School.

trailers.title: [Trailer] กว่าจะเป็นครู... | Thank You Teacher
